param.name: cachePool
param.comment: Trade cache pool: mk3 (traders) or mk4 (supply)

param.name: cacheReadOffset
param.comment: Rotates cache scan start so concurrent fleet ships pick different entries first

param.name: sellPriceMax
param.comment: Max vs ware average for supplier sell offers (ship buys). Normalized -1..+1 offset; 1.0 = no filter (isolated). Matches live search SellPriceMax.

param.name: buyPriceMin
param.comment: Min vs ware average for customer buy offers (ship sells). Normalized -1..+1 offset; -1.0 = no filter (isolated). Matches live search BuyPriceMin.

param.name: bypassPlayerSellerPricing
param.comment: When true, skip supplier price-band purge for player-owned suppliers (MK3 Ignore Player Pricing).

param.name: ignoreTradeRules
param.comment: When false, drop entries where a player-owned station's trade rules block the pair (NPC×NPC ignores cantradewith).

do_if.value: $homeCacheCount == 0 and this.$gt_cachePoolIsMk4 and global.$GT_TradeCacheMK4? and $homeSector? and $homeSector.exists

set_value.name: $purgeReResolvable
set_value.exact: @$purgeEntry.$SellSector != null and @$purgeEntry.$SellSector.exists and (@$purgeEntry.$Ware != null or @$purgeEntry.$DeliveryStationName != null) and (@$purgeEntry.$DeliveryStationId != null or @$purgeEntry.$DeliveryStationName != null)

do_if.value: not $purgeRemove and not $purgeReResolvable and @$purgeEntry.$SellOffer != null and not @$purgeEntry.$SellOffer.exists
not $purgeRemove and not $purgeReResolvable and @$purgeEntry.$SellStation != null and not @$purgeEntry.$SellStation.exists

debug_text.text: '[GT-CacheSearch] ' + $ship.idcode + ': (' + $poolLabel + ') Read-time purge removed ' + $purgedStaleCount + ' stale entries from ' + $cacheHomeKey.knownname + ' (remaining: ' + $homeCacheCount + ')'

set_value.name: $wareBasketCount
set_value.exact: if $wareBasket? and typeof $wareBasket == datatype.list then $wareBasket.count else 0

do_if.value: $entrySellStation != null and @$entrySellStation.exists and not @$entrySellStation.isclass.buildstorage and $entrySellStationFromBuyer? and @$entrySellStationFromBuyer.exists and @$entrySellStationFromBuyer.isclass.buildstorage
($entrySellStation == null or not @$entrySellStation.exists) and $entry.$SellSector? and @$entry.$SellSector.exists and $reResolveWare?

set_value.name: $reMemoAnchor
set_value.exact: if $entry.$DeliveryStationId? then $entry.$DeliveryStationId else (if $entry.$DeliveryStationName? then $entry.$DeliveryStationName else null)

do_if.value: not $reTargetStation? and $reBsCand? and @$reBsCand.exists and $reBsCand.base? and @$reBsCand.base.exists and @$reBsCand.base.idcode == $entry.$DeliveryStationId

set_value.name: $serveHomeSector
set_value.exact: if $serveHomeAnchor? and $serveHomeAnchor.isclass.sector then $serveHomeAnchor else (if $serveHomeAnchor? and $serveHomeAnchor.sector? then @$serveHomeAnchor.sector else $homeSector)

do_if.value: $cacheDropoffTolerance gt 0 and not $entry.$IsSellOnly? and $entry.$UnitProfit? and $entry.$UnitProfit gt 0 and $entry.$BuyOffer? and $entry.$SellOffer?
not $skipSupplierBandFilter and $bypassPlayerSellerPricing? and $bypassPlayerSellerPricing and $entry.$BuyOffer? and @$entry.$BuyOffer.exists and @$entry.$BuyOffer.owner.isplayerowned

($entryBuyStation? and @$entryBuyStation.isclass.ship and (@$entryBuyStation.type == shiptype.carrier or @$entryBuyStation.type == shiptype.resupplier)) or ($entrySellStation? and @$entrySellStation.isclass.ship and (@$entrySellStation.type == shiptype.carrier or @$entrySellStation.type == shiptype.resupplier))
not $deadRemove and $bandPriceCheckActive? and $bandPriceCheckActive and not ($deadEntry.$IsSellOnly? and $deadEntry.$IsSellOnly)
not $deadSkipSupplierBand and $bypassPlayerSellerPricing? and $bypassPlayerSellerPricing and $deadEntry.$BuyOffer? and @$deadEntry.$BuyOffer.exists and @$deadEntry.$BuyOffer.owner.isplayerowned
not $deadRemove and $enableMinCargoUtil and not $isIsolatedMode and not ($deadEntry.$IsSellOnly? and $deadEntry.$IsSellOnly)

debug_text.text: '[GT-CacheSearch] ' + $ship.idcode + ': Read-time purge removed ' + $purgedDeadCount + ' unreadable entries from ' + $cacheHomeKey.knownname + ' (remaining: ' + $homeCacheCount + ')'
